CIn+FATOpvM=.query:
switch(asset.kind) {
case _ == "baremetal":
  return "Bare metal system"
case _ == "virtualmachine":
  return "Virtual machine"
case _ == "container-image":
  return "Container image"
case _ == "container":
  return "Container"
case _ == "network-device":
  return "Network device"
default:
  return _
}

case _ == "network-device":

default:

}
